title: Find Two Non-overlapping Sub-arrays Each With Target Sum
hints: Identify all subarrays summing to target and record their minimum lengths ending at each index.
Use a prefix sum or sliding window to find valid subarrays, storing the shortest valid length ending at or before each position.
Iterate through the array, tracking the best valid subarray length found so far on the left, and combine it with valid subarrays on the right.
